mapper.select:
SELECT mta.id,mta.task_id,st.name,mta.create_by_id,mta.create_time, mta.weight,mta.video, meb.user_nike FROM member_task_apply mta LEFT JOIN(SELECT id,name FROM scenic_task) st ON st.id = mta.task_id LEFT JOIN(SELECT user_nike,user_id FROM member) meb ON meb.user_id = mta.create_by_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND mta.video IS NOT NULL
AND st.name like concat(concat('%',#{name}),'%')
AND mta.task_id = #{taskId}
AND mta.create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S')
AND mta.create_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S')
ORDER BY mta.weight ASC , mta.create_time DESC
